name: Packable Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Preparation Time: 0:50
In a mixing bowl, combine cake mix, sour cream, oil, water, and eggs. Beat for 2 minutes. Fold in chocolate chips. Pour into a greased 10-inch fluted tube pan. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until cake tests done. Cool in pan for 20 minutes before removing to a wire rack. Just before serving, dust with powdered sugar.
